segments.text: This call is being recorded for quality assurance. Thank you for calling Bridgewater. I'm Robin, a virtual assistant. What can I do to help you?
Schedule new appointment.
Thanks for letting me know. Are you a new patient to our office or have you been seen here before?
New patient.
Thanks. Would you like to book an annual routine eye exam or do you need a medical eye appointment that requires immediate attention?
Immediate attention.
Thanks for letting me know. Since you need a medical eye appointment that requires immediate
attention, I will have a staff member call you back as soon as possible to assist you directly.
Could you please provide your first and last name, spelling both out for me?
May I please have your date of birth? June 16th, 1982. Got it. What is the best phone
number for our staff to reach you? Thank you. Can you briefly describe your symptoms
or the reason you need immediate attention.
I need contact replacements.
My previous optometrist at a different facility is retiring
and I'm looking to switch businesses.
Thanks for explaining.
Contact lens prescription renewals or replacements.
You will need a routine eye exam
rather than a medical emergency appointment.
Would you like to schedule a routine eye exam
for contact lenses as a new patient?
Yes.
Thanks for clarifying.
Have you worn contact lenses before
or would this be your first time?
I have worn contact lenses before.
Perfect. I will book you for a routine eye exam as a previous contact lens wearer.
Were you referred by another doctor or how did you hear about us?
Another client.
Thanks for sharing that.
Do you have a preference for Dr. Joyce Reichert or Dr. Caroline Bertler
or would you like the first available appointment?
First available.
Finding the first available slot for a new patient contact lens exam.
The first available appointment is with Dr. Caroline Bertler
on Wednesday May 20th at 12.30pm or with Dr. Rachel Smith on Wednesday May 20th at
12.45pm. Which would you prefer? 12.30pm. Great. I will book your appointment with
Dr. Caroline Bertler on Wednesday May 20th at 12.30pm. Can you please provide
your full address? Thank you. What is the best email address for you? Thanks.
What is your primary medical insurance name and the subscriber ID? Health
If you are unable to locate your subscriber ID, I can have a staff member call you back
to finish scheduling your appointment.
Could you please confirm the best phone number to reach you?
Is it?
Yes.
Subscriber ID.
Thanks for providing that.
Do you have a vision plan such as VSP or IMED?
If yes, please share the vision plan name and ID.
If not, just let me know.
I do not.
Thanks for letting me know.
If you have Medicare, do you also have a supplemental or secondary insurance?
or should I continue continue here is a quick summary before I book your
appointment I am scheduling a routine eye exam for contact lens previous
wearer with Dr. Caroline Burtler on Wednesday May 20th at 12 30 p.m. of
birth June 16th 1982 your address is your email your medical insurance is
health plans Inc. vision plan you were referred by another client is all of
correct? Correct. Please wait while I book your appointment. Your appointment is
scheduled with Dr. Caroline Bertler on Wednesday May 20th at 12 30 p.m. If you
need a referral from your primary care provider please be sure to get one
before your visit. We will send you a text confirming your appointment details.
We use Optus Retinal Imaging as part of our comprehensive exam process to
avoid the need for dilating eye drops in most cases. This costs $45 and
insurance may not cover it but we will verify your coverage before your visit.
Would you like more information on the pricing? No. All right, do you need
directions to our office? No. We are looking forward to seeing you on
Wednesday May 20th at 12 30 p.m. I will send you a text with your appointment
details. Is there anything else I can help you with today? No. Thank you for
calling. Have a great day.
